actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke SteamAudioManager.Reinitialize() (script GUID b11066ff95bbf3344b868394742f7002, MonoBehaviour id 1695945195) to simulate runtime audio setting changes requiring full audio device and simulator reinitialization. Expected: stops any existing simulation thread, clears dynamic/additive scenes, recreates devices (Embree/OpenCL/RadeonRays/TAN as applicable), rebuilds Simulator and AudioEngineState.

Query the audio engine state via SteamAudioManager.GetAudioEngineState() after reinitialization to validate that an AudioEngineState is available or null if initialization failed due to platform/device constraints.

Manually invoke SteamAudioManager.ShutDown() to simulate application quit and ensure cleanup executes. Expected: simulation thread stops, dynamic objects and additive scenes are removed, audio engine state destroyed, simulator and devices released, context released.
